heartbeats.title: Scheduler Heartbeats
heartbeats.description: Agents with a timer heartbeat enabled across all of your companies.
heartbeats.empty: No scheduler heartbeats match the current criteria.
generalDescription: Configure instance-wide defaults that affect how operator-visible logs are displayed.
censorUsernameDescription: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.
keyboardShortcutsDescription: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating issues or toggling panels. This is off by default.
feedbackSharingDescription: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to Paperclip Labs. Votes are always saved locally.
feedbackDontAllowDesc: Keep voted AI outputs local only.
signOutDescription: Sign out of this Paperclip instance. You will be redirected to the login page.
languageDescription: Select the display language for the Paperclip interface.
selectFileToPreview: Select a file to preview its contents.
import.selectCompany: Select a company to import into.
import.fieldGitHubUrlHint: Repo tree path or blob URL to COMPANY.md (e.g. github.com/owner/repo/tree/main/company).
import.fieldTargetHint: Import into this company or create a new one.
import.fieldNewCompanyNameHint: Optional override. Leave blank to use the package name.
import.fieldCollisionStrategyHint: Board imports can rename, skip, or replace matching company content.
noCompanySelected: No company selected. Select a company from the switcher above.
heading: Company Settings
fieldCompanyNameHint: The display name for your company.
fieldDescriptionHint: Optional description shown in the company profile.
fieldLogoHint: Upload a PNG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF, or SVG logo image.
fieldBrandColorHint: Sets the hue for the company icon. Leave empty for auto-generated color.
fieldRequireApproval: Require board approval for new hires
fieldRequireApprovalHint: New agent hires stay pending until approved by board.
fieldFeedbackSharing: Allow sharing voted AI outputs with Paperclip Labs
fieldFeedbackSharingHint: Only AI-generated outputs you explicitly vote on are eligible for feedback sharing.
experimental.title: Experimental
experimental.description: Opt into features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.
experimental.isolatedWorkspacesDesc: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.
experimental.autoRestartDesc: In `pnpm dev:once`, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.
reinstallConfirm: This will pull the latest version of {{packageName}} from npm and hot-swap the running adapter module. Existing agents will use the new version on their next run.
alphaWarning: The adapter plugin system is under active development. APIs and storage format may change. Use the power icon to hide adapters from agent menus without removing them.
installHint: Install an adapter package to extend model support.
binaryPreviewUnavailable: Binary asset preview is not available for this file type.
feedbackSharingHint: Votes are always saved locally. This setting controls whether voted AI outputs may also be marked for sharing with Paperclip Labs.
packagesMoved: Import and export have moved to dedicated pages accessible from the Org Chart header.
archiveHint: Archive this company to hide it from the sidebar. This persists in the database.
feedbackNoDefault: No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here.
devRetest: To retest the first-use prompt in local dev, remove the feedbackDataSharingPreference key from the instance_settings.general JSON row for this instance, or set it back to "prompt". Unset and "prompt" both mean no default has been chosen yet.
removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove the
removeConfirmSuffix: adapter? It will be unregistered and removed from the adapter store.
installExternalAdapterDesc: Add an adapter from npm or a local path. The adapter package must export createServerAdapter().
pathHint: Accepts Linux, WSL, and Windows paths. Windows paths are auto-converted.
npmCleanup: npm packages will be cleaned up from disk.
invite.expiredOrRevoked: This invite may be expired, revoked, or already used.
invite.adminConfigured: The first instance admin is now configured. You can continue to the board.
invite.pendingApproval: Your request is pending admin approval. You will not have access until approved.
invite.signInFirst: Sign in or create an account before submitting a human join request.
import.sourceDesc: Choose a GitHub repo or upload a local Paperclip zip package.
import.localZipHelp: Upload a .zip exported directly from Paperclip. Re-zipped archives created by Finder, Explorer, or other zip tools may not import correctly.
dangerZone.archiveDescription: Archive this company to hide it from the sidebar. This persists in the database.
feedbackSharing.description: Votes are always saved locally. This setting controls whether voted AI outputs may also be marked for sharing with Paperclip Labs.
field.allowSharing: Allow sharing voted AI outputs with Paperclip Labs
field.requireBoardApproval: Require board approval for new hires
hint.allowSharing: Only AI-generated outputs you explicitly vote on are eligible for feedback sharing.
hint.brandColor: Sets the hue for the company icon. Leave empty for auto-generated color.
hint.companyName: The display name for your company.
hint.description: Optional description shown in the company profile.
hint.logo: Upload a PNG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF, or SVG logo image.
hint.requireBoardApproval: New agent hires stay pending until approved by board.
invites.generateDescription: Generate an OpenClaw agent invite snippet.
invites.generateHint: Creates a short-lived OpenClaw agent invite and renders a copy-ready prompt.
packages.movedDescription: Import and export have moved to dedicated pages accessible from the
companyAccess.selectCompany: Select a company to manage access.
companyAccess.noPermission: You do not have permission to manage company members.
companyAccess.heading: Company Access
companyAccess.description: Manage company user memberships, membership status, and explicit permission grants for {{companyName}}.
companyAccess.instanceAdminNote: This account can manage access here through instance-admin privileges, but it does not currently hold an active company membership.
companyAccess.humansDescription: Manage human company memberships, status, and grants here.
companyAccess.pendingHumanJoinsDesc: Review human join requests before they become active company members.
companyAccess.noMembers: No user memberships found for this company yet.
companyAccess.editMemberDescription: Update company role, membership status, and explicit grants for {{memberName}}.
companyAccess.grantsDescription: Roles provide implicit grants automatically. Explicit grants below are only for overrides and extra access that should persist even if the role changes.
companyAccess.noRoleSelected: No role is selected, so this member has no implicit grants right now.
companyAccess.implicitGrantHint: Included implicitly by the {{roleName}} role. Add an explicit grant only if it should stay after the role changes.
companyInvites.selectCompany: Select a company to manage invites.
companyInvites.noPermission: You do not have permission to manage company invites.
companyInvites.heading: Company Invites
companyInvites.description: Create human invite links for company access. New invite links are copied to your clipboard when they are generated.
companyInvites.createInviteDesc: Generate a human invite link and choose the default access it should request.
companyInvites.roleViewerDesc: Can view company work and follow along without operational permissions.
companyInvites.roleOperatorDesc: Recommended for people who need to help run work without managing access.
companyInvites.roleAdminDesc: Recommended for operators who need to invite people, create agents, and approve joins.
companyInvites.roleAdminGets: Can create agents, invite users, assign tasks, and approve join requests.
companyInvites.roleOwnerDesc: Full company access, including membership and permission management.
companyInvites.roleOwnerGets: Everything in Admin, plus managing members and permission grants.
companyInvites.singleUseNote: Each invite link is single-use. The first successful use consumes the link and creates or reuses the matching join request before approval.
companyInvites.inviteHistoryAudit: Invite history below keeps the audit trail.
companyInvites.inviteUrlNote: This URL includes the current Paperclip domain returned by the server.
companyInvites.inviteHistoryDesc: Review invite status, role, inviter, and any linked join request.
companyInvites.noInvites: No invites have been created for this company yet.
companyInvites.copyManually: Copy the invite URL manually from the field below.
companyInvites.toastInviteReadyCopied: Invite ready below and copied to clipboard.
joinRequests.selectCompany: Select a company to review join requests.
joinRequests.noPermission: You do not have permission to review join requests for this company.
joinRequests.heading: Join Request Queue
joinRequests.description: Review human and agent join requests outside the mixed inbox feed. This queue uses the same approval mutations as the inline inbox cards.
joinRequests.noResults: No join requests match the current filters.
instanceAccess.noPermission: Instance admin access is required to manage users.
instanceAccess.heading: Instance Access
instanceAccess.description: Search users, manage instance-admin status, and control which companies they can access.
instanceAccess.selectUser: Select a user to inspect instance access.
instanceAccess.companyAccessDesc: Toggle company membership for this user. New access defaults to an active operator membership.
profile.heading: Profile
profile.description: Control how your account appears in the sidebar and other board surfaces.
profile.selectCompanyForAvatar: Select a company before uploading a profile avatar.
profile.uploadHintWithCompany: Stored in Paperclip file storage for {{companyName}}.
profile.uploadHintNoCompany: Select a company to upload an avatar into Paperclip storage.
profile.clickAvatarHint: Click the avatar to upload a new image.
profile.displayNameHint: Shown in the sidebar account footer and comment author surfaces.
profile.emailHint: Email is managed by your auth session and is read-only here.
deploymentLocalTrusted: Local trusted mode is optimized for a local operator. Browser requests run as local board context and no sign-in is required.
deploymentAuthPublic: Authenticated public mode requires sign-in for board access and is intended for public URLs.
deploymentAuthPrivate: Authenticated private mode requires sign-in and is intended for LAN, VPN, or other private-network deployments.
backupRetentionDescription: Configure how long to keep automatic database backups at each tier. Daily backups are kept in full, then thinned to one per week and one per month. Backups are compressed with gzip.
